page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.16xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated physical cores utilizing the x86_64 architecture, driven by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at a clock speed of 2.7 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-to-core ratio, each of the 64 vCPUs maps directly to a physical core, ensuring dedicated execution resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. This substantial memory allocation makes the instance suitable for memory-intensive workloads. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Given its hardware profile, the ecs.r7.16xlarge offers qualitative cost efficiency for enterprise applications requiring massive RAM capacity without the need for local NVMe drives or GPU acceleration. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable compute performance, while the 32 Gbps network baseline supports high-throughput data transfers to external storage volumes.
This instance is designed for workloads such as large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, heavy data caching layers, and memory-bound data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.16xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 64 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.7 GHz. It provides 512.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core ratio that supports memory-intensive operations. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, ensuring dedicated compute resources. It lacks local storage and GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and offering a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. This hardware profile delivers predictable performance and qualitative cost efficiency for resource-dense deployments. The ecs.r7.16xlarge is engineered for workloads such as in-memory databases, large-scale caching, enterprise applications, and memory-bound data processing.

tagline: A dedicated memory-optimized instance featuring sixty-four physical cores and half a terabyte of RAM for demanding enterprise database workloads.
